title: lithocardium ambiguum
side_effects: Lithocardium ambiguum can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to its toxic properties. Prolonged consumption can also lead to digestive issues, including diarrhea and stomach pain. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can cause cardiac problems, including arrhythmias and palpitations. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the lithocardium ambiguum plant for any health benefits.
